task.summary: added more Blocks loot tables and recipes
added an Advanced Block and an Advanced Item
added horse armor, custom armor trims and custom item model predicates
added custom sounds, music discs, effects, potions, paintings, enchantments, crops, bushes and basic world gen
added world ore generation for titan ore
added world bush generation and changed up tree mechanics
Added custom entity and a custom projectile aswell as Entityvariants
Added Custom Loot Tables, 3D Models, 2D Animated Textures, Particles and VillagerProfessions
Added Custom growth Chamber and Pedestal (Block Entitys)

MESSAGE.value: added more Blocks loot tables and recipes
added an Advanced Block and an Advanced Item
added horse armor, custom armor trims and custom item model predicates
added custom sounds, music discs, effects, potions, paintings, enchantments, crops, bushes and basic world gen
added world ore generation for titan ore
added world tree generation and new custom trees
added world bush generation and changed up tree mechanics
Added custom entity and a custom projectile aswell as Entityvariants
Added Custom Loot Tables, 3D Models, 2D Animated Textures, Particles and VillagerProfessions
Added Custom growth Chamber and Pedestal (Block Entitys)
